title: vanilla-router
html:
Vanilla JS · No framework

A router that behaves like one

Every folder here is a real page: index.html for a direct load, main.json for the SPA router to fetch, main.js for behavior. No build step required.

Static-first

Turn JS off, or remove the router.js tag: every link is still a real page load, e.g. /about/index.html.

Detachable router

/assets/router.js knows nothing about this app — it just fetches main.json and swaps #view.

Guards

Visit Dashboard while logged out — its own main.js checks auth and redirects to Login.
